categories.name: Toast

categories.name: Tabs
categories.description: Tab panels with keyboard navigation and positioning (requires @erickxavier/nojs-elements plugin)

categories.name: Tree
categories.description: Hierarchical tree view with expand/collapse and keyboard navigation (requires @erickxavier/nojs-elements plugin)

categories.name: Stepper
categories.description: Multi-step wizard with validation and progress indicator (requires @erickxavier/nojs-elements plugin)

categories.name: Skeleton
categories.description: Loading placeholder with shimmer animation (requires @erickxavier/nojs-elements plugin)

categories.name: Split
categories.description: Resizable split panes with persistence and keyboard control (requires @erickxavier/nojs-elements plugin)

categories.name: Sortable Table
categories.description: Column sorting, sticky headers, and sticky columns for tables (requires @erickxavier/nojs-elements plugin)

directives.name: base
directives.description: Set API base URL for all descendant HTTP directives

examples.description: Set base URL for all fetch directives

directives.name: get
directives.description: Fetch data via HTTP GET request. Companion attributes: as, loading, error, empty, success, refresh, cached, into, debounce, headers, params, skeleton (CLS-prevention placeholder element id), retry, retry-delay. Static URLs automatically get a preload hint injected.

examples.description: Fetch and display a list of users

directives.name: post
directives.description: Submit data via HTTP POST request

examples.html:
<form post="/login" body="{ email, password }" as="result">
  <input model="email">
  <input model="password" type="password">
  <button>Login</button>
</form>

directives.name: put
directives.description: Update data via HTTP PUT request

directives.name: patch
directives.description: Partial update via HTTP PATCH request

directives.name: delete
directives.description: Delete data via HTTP DELETE request

directives.name: as
directives.description: Name for fetched data in the local context

directives.name: body
directives.description: Request body for POST/PUT/PATCH requests

directives.name: headers
directives.description: Custom request headers

directives.name: params
directives.description: Query parameters appended to the URL

directives.name: cached
directives.description: Cache HTTP responses. Options: memory (default), local (localStorage), session (sessionStorage)

directives.name: into
directives.description: Write response to a named global store

directives.name: debounce
directives.description: Debounce reactive URL refetches (milliseconds)

directives.name: retry
directives.description: Override global retry count for this request

directives.name: retry-delay
directives.description: Override global retry delay in ms (default: 1000)

directives.name: state
directives.description: Create local reactive state on an element

directives.name: store
directives.description: Define or access a global reactive store

directives.name: computed
directives.description: Derived reactive value, recomputed when dependencies change

directives.name: watch
directives.description: React to value changes by executing an expression

directives.name: persist
directives.description: Persist state to localStorage or sessionStorage

directives.name: persist-key
directives.description: Custom localStorage/sessionStorage key for persisted state

directives.name: persist-fields
directives.description: Comma-separated list of state fields to persist selectively

directives.name: model
directives.description: Two-way binding for input elements

examples.html: Hello, !

directives.name: bind
directives.description: One-way data binding — sets element textContent

directives.name: bind-html
directives.description: Set innerHTML (sanitized) from an expression

directives.name: bind-*
directives.description: Bind any HTML attribute to an expression

directives.name: if
directives.description: Conditionally render element (removes from DOM when false)

directives.name: else-if
directives.description: Chained conditional following an if

directives.name: then
directives.description: Template to render when condition is truthy

directives.name: else
directives.description: Template to render when condition is falsy, or fallback block after if

directives.name: show
directives.description: Toggle element visibility via CSS display (element stays in DOM)

directives.name: hide
directives.description: Inverse of show — hides element when condition is true

directives.name: switch
directives.description: Switch/case rendering based on a value

directives.name: case
directives.description: Case match inside a switch block

directives.name: default
directives.description: Default case inside a switch block

directives.name: each
directives.description: Simple loop — iterates over an array

directives.name: foreach
directives.description: Extended loop with advanced features (template, filter, sort, limit, offset)

directives.name: from
directives.description: Source array for foreach loop

directives.name: template
directives.description: Template ID to clone for each iteration in foreach

directives.name: index
directives.description: Variable name for the current index in foreach

directives.name: key
directives.description: Unique key for efficient list diffing

directives.name: filter
directives.description: Filter expression for foreach — only render matching items

directives.name: sort
directives.description: Sort property for foreach

directives.name: limit
directives.description: Maximum number of items to render in foreach

directives.name: offset
directives.description: Number of items to skip in foreach

directives.name: on:*
directives.description: Event handler — supports all DOM events plus lifecycle hooks
directives.notes: Modifiers: .prevent, .stop, .once, .self. Key modifiers: .enter, .escape, .tab, etc. Lifecycle: on:mounted, on:unmounted

directives.name: class-*
directives.description: Toggle a CSS class based on a condition

directives.name: class-map
directives.description: Apply multiple CSS classes from an object expression

directives.name: style-*
directives.description: Set an inline style property

directives.name: style-map
directives.description: Apply multiple inline styles from an object expression

directives.name: validate
directives.description: Enable validation on a form or field. Built-in validators: required, email, url, min, max, custom
directives.notes: $form context provides: valid, dirty, touched, errors, firstError, errorCount, fields, values, pending, reset()

directives.name: route
directives.description: Define a route or create a navigation link. On <template route>, companion attributes page-title, page-description, page-canonical, page-jsonld update <head> on each navigation. Expressions can use $route and $store.

examples.html:
<template route="/products/:id"
          page-title="'Product ' + $route.params.id + ' | Store'"
          page-description="'View product detail'"
          page-canonical="'/products/' + $route.params.id"
          page-jsonld='{"@type":"Product","name":"{$route.params.id}"}'>

directives.notes: Route head attributes (page-title, page-description, page-canonical, page-jsonld) are evaluated once per navigation. Use single-quoted strings for literals. $store changes after navigation do not trigger re-evaluation.

directives.name: route-view
directives.description: Route outlet that renders the matched route template
directives.notes: src: directory for file-based routing. route-index: filename for root '/'. ext: file extension (default .tpl, fallback .html)

directives.name: guard
directives.description: Route guard — prevents navigation if condition is falsy

directives.name: route-active
directives.description: CSS class added to active route links

directives.name: lazy
directives.description: Control when route templates are fetched. 'ondemand': load on first visit. 'priority': load before everything else.

directives.name: animate
directives.description: Apply CSS animation on element entry

directives.name: animate-enter
directives.description: CSS animation for entering the DOM

directives.name: animate-leave
directives.description: CSS animation for leaving the DOM

directives.name: animate-duration
directives.description: Animation duration in milliseconds

directives.name: animate-stagger
directives.description: Stagger delay between animated list items

directives.name: transition
directives.description: Apply CSS transition class for route/conditional changes

directives.name: drag
directives.description: Make an element draggable

directives.name: drag-type
directives.description: Data type identifier for drag operations

directives.name: drag-effect
directives.description: Allowed drag effect: move, copy, link, or all

directives.name: drag-handle
directives.description: CSS selector to restrict drag initiation to a handle element

directives.name: drag-disabled
directives.description: Disable drag conditionally

directives.name: drag-class
directives.description: CSS class added to source element while dragging

directives.name: drag-group
directives.description: Scope drag to a named group

directives.name: drop
directives.description: Make an element a drop zone

directives.name: drop-accept
directives.description: Restrict which drag types are accepted

directives.name: drop-effect
directives.description: Visual feedback effect on drop zone

directives.name: drop-class
directives.description: CSS class added to drop zone on valid drag-over

directives.name: drop-disabled
directives.description: Disable drop conditionally

directives.name: drop-max
directives.description: Maximum number of items in drop zone

directives.name: drop-sort
directives.description: Enable positional sorting within drop zone

directives.name: drag-list
directives.description: Create a sortable list bound to a state array

directives.name: drag-multiple
directives.description: Enable lasso/multi-select on children

directives.name: modal
directives.description: Declare a modal dialog using the native Popover API with focus trapping, stacking z-index, and ARIA attributes

examples.html: Edit Profile
examples.description: Modal with custom class and Escape disabled

directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Companion attributes: modal-class, modal-escape, modal-backdrop. Auto-generates unique ID if value is empty. Supports nested modals with z-index stacking (base 10000). ARIA: role=dialog, aria-modal=true, aria-labelledby, focus trap.

directives.name: modal-open
directives.description: Open a modal dialog by ID on click
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Without value, finds nearest modal in scope. Auto-adds aria-haspopup=dialog, aria-expanded, aria-controls.

directives.name: modal-close
directives.description: Close a modal dialog. Without value, closes closest ancestor modal. With value, closes by ID
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Focus returns to trigger element on close.

directives.name: modal-class
directives.description: Additional CSS class(es) applied while the modal is open
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements.

directives.name: modal-escape
directives.description: Control whether Escape key and backdrop click close the modal
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Default: true.

directives.name: modal-backdrop
directives.description: Control whether a dark backdrop overlay is shown behind the modal
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Default: true.

directives.name: dropdown
directives.description: Wrap a toggle, menu, and items into a dropdown unit using the native Popover API for light-dismiss

examples.html:
• Edit
  • Duplicate
  • Delete

• Settings
  • Logout
examples.description: Dropdown positioned to the right with end alignment

directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Companion attributes: dropdown-position (bottom|top|left|right), dropdown-align (start|end). Menu uses position:fixed and auto-flips on viewport overflow.

directives.name: dropdown-toggle
directives.description: Toggle button that opens/closes the dropdown menu on click
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Must be inside a [dropdown] container. Auto-adds aria-haspopup=menu, aria-expanded, aria-controls.

directives.name: dropdown-menu
directives.description: Popover menu panel that appears when the toggle is activated
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Uses popover=auto for native light-dismiss. Auto-adds role=menu, .nojs-dropdown-menu class.

directives.name: dropdown-item
directives.description: Actionable item inside a dropdown menu with keyboard navigation support
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Auto-adds role=menuitem, tabindex=-1. Supports disabled attribute. Keyboard: Arrow keys navigate, Enter/Space activate, Escape closes.

directives.name: dropdown-position
directives.description: Primary axis for dropdown menu placement
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Values: bottom (default), top, left, right.

directives.name: dropdown-align
directives.description: Cross-axis alignment of the dropdown menu relative to the toggle
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Values: start (default), end.

directives.name: tooltip
directives.description: Show a tooltip on hover/focus with automatic positioning

examples.description: Tooltip positioned below with custom delay

directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Companion attributes: tooltip-position (top|bottom|left|right, default top), tooltip-delay (ms, default 300), tooltip-disabled (expression). ARIA: role=tooltip, aria-describedby. Shows on focusin for keyboard accessibility.

directives.name: tooltip-position
directives.description: Placement of the tooltip relative to the trigger element
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Values: top (default), bottom, left, right.

directives.name: tooltip-delay
directives.description: Delay in milliseconds before the tooltip appears
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Default: 300ms.

directives.name: tooltip-disabled
directives.description: Reactive boolean expression that prevents the tooltip from showing when truthy
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements.

directives.name: popover
directives.description: Declare popover content with a unique ID, using the native Popover API for light-dismiss

examples.description: Popover with trigger and dismiss button

examples.html: Click here for more information.

directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Companion attribute: popover-position (top|bottom|left|right, default bottom). Uses native popover=auto for light-dismiss. ARIA: aria-haspopup, aria-expanded, aria-controls on triggers.

directives.name: popover-trigger
directives.description: Toggle a popover open/closed on click. Without value, finds nearest popover in scope
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Auto-adds aria-haspopup=true, aria-expanded, aria-controls.

directives.name: popover-dismiss
directives.description: Close the closest ancestor popover on click
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Place inside a [popover] element.

directives.name: popover-position
directives.description: Placement of the popover relative to its trigger element
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Values: top, bottom (default), left, right. 8px gap, viewport-aware flip logic.

directives.name: toast-container
directives.description: Define where toast notifications appear on screen. Multiple containers can coexist at different positions

examples.description: Multiple toast containers at different positions

directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Positions: top-right (default), top-left, top-center, bottom-right, bottom-left, bottom-center. Auto-created on body if none declared. ARIA: role=log, aria-live=polite.

directives.name: toast
directives.description: Watch an expression and show a toast notification when it changes to a truthy value

examples.description: Show success toast when message changes

directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Companion attributes: toast-type (info|success|warning|error, default info), toast-duration (ms, default 3000, 0 for permanent), toast-dismiss (true|false, default true). Global function: $toast(message, type?, duration?) returns HTMLElement.

directives.name: toast-type
directives.description: Visual type of the toast notification
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Values: info (default), success, warning, error. Set as data-type on the element.

directives.name: toast-duration
directives.description: Auto-dismiss delay in milliseconds. Use 0 for permanent toasts
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Default: 3000ms.

directives.name: toast-dismiss
directives.description: Whether to show a dismiss button on the toast
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Default: true.

directives.name: tabs
directives.description: Tab container that pairs [tab] triggers with [panel] content by order

examples.html:
Profile content...
Settings content...

Overview panel
Locked panel
Details panel

directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Value sets initial tab index (0-based, default 0). Companion attribute: tab-position (top|bottom|left|right, default top). ARIA: role=tablist, role=tab, role=tabpanel with full keyboard navigation.

directives.name: tab
directives.description: Mark an element as a tab trigger inside a [tabs] container
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Companion attribute: tab-disabled (expression). Paired with [panel] by order. ARIA: role=tab, aria-selected, aria-controls.

directives.name: tab-disabled
directives.description: Disable a tab so it cannot be activated and is skipped by keyboard navigation
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Reactive expression.

directives.name: panel
directives.description: Mark an element as a tab panel inside a [tabs] container. Paired with [tab] by order
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. ARIA: role=tabpanel, aria-labelledby. Inactive panels get aria-hidden=true and inert.

directives.name: tab-position
directives.description: Placement of the tab list relative to the panels
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Values: top (default), bottom, left, right.

directives.name: tree
directives.description: Declare a tree root for hierarchical expand/collapse navigation

examples.html:
• Documents
    • Work
      • Report.pdf
    • README.md

directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Companion attribute: tree-icon (true|false, default true). ARIA: role=tree. Full keyboard navigation with typeahead search.

directives.name: branch
directives.description: Expandable tree item that can contain a [subtree] child
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Value 'expanded' starts the branch open. ARIA: role=treeitem, aria-expanded, aria-selected. Clicking selects the branch (mutually exclusive).

directives.name: subtree
directives.description: Collapsible content group inside a [branch]
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. ARIA: role=group, aria-hidden. Shown/hidden when parent branch is toggled.

directives.name: tree-icon
directives.description: Show or hide the built-in expand/collapse triangle icons
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Default: true.

directives.name: stepper
directives.description: Multi-step wizard container with progress indicator and navigation

examples.html: Name:

...
...
...

directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Value sets initial step index (0-based, default 0). Companion attributes: stepper-mode (linear|free, default linear), stepper-indicator (true|false), stepper-nav (true|false). Provides $stepper context: current, total, isFirst, isLast, next(), prev(), goTo(). Event: step-change.

directives.name: step
directives.description: Define a step panel inside a [stepper] container
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Companion attributes: step-label (string, default 'Step N'), step-validate (expression for linear mode validation).

directives.name: step-label
directives.description: Custom label shown in the stepper progress indicator
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Default: 'Step N'.

directives.name: step-validate
directives.description: Expression that must be truthy for the step to pass validation in linear mode
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Checked in addition to required inputs.

directives.name: stepper-mode
directives.description: Navigation mode for the stepper
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Values: linear (default, validates before advancing), free (any step clickable).

directives.name: stepper-indicator
directives.description: Show or hide the stepper progress indicator
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Default: true.

directives.name: stepper-nav
directives.description: Show or hide the Previous/Next navigation buttons
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Default: true.

directives.name: skeleton
directives.description: Display a shimmer loading placeholder while a reactive expression is truthy

examples.html:
Article Title

Content appears after loading.
examples.description: Text skeleton on heading and paragraph

directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Companion attributes: skeleton-type (text|circle|rect, default text), skeleton-lines (number), skeleton-size (number/string for circle/rect dimensions). ARIA: aria-busy=true while active. Shimmer adapts to dark mode via color-mix().

directives.name: skeleton-type
directives.description: Shape of the skeleton placeholder
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Values: text (default, full-width bars), circle (circular), rect (rectangular).

directives.name: skeleton-lines
directives.description: Number of simulated text lines for the skeleton placeholder
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Last line is 60% width for a natural paragraph look.

directives.name: skeleton-size
directives.description: Explicit width and height for circle or rect skeleton types
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Appends px if value is a bare number.

directives.name: split
directives.description: Create a resizable split container with draggable gutters between panes

examples.html:
Left panel
Right panel

Sidebar
Editor
Preview
examples.description: Vertical split with persistence and constraints

directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Value: horizontal (default) or vertical. Companion attributes: split-gutter (px, default 6), split-persist (localStorage key). Events: split-resize, split-collapse. ARIA: role=separator on gutters with keyboard control.

directives.name: pane
directives.description: Define a resizable pane inside a [split] container
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Value: CSS size (px or %). Companion attributes: pane-min (px, default 0), pane-max (px, default Infinity), pane-collapsible (true for double-click collapse).

directives.name: pane-min
directives.description: Minimum pane size in pixels
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Default: 0.

directives.name: pane-max
directives.description: Maximum pane size in pixels
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Default: Infinity.

directives.name: pane-collapsible
directives.description: Enable collapse/expand of a pane via double-click on the adjacent gutter
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements.

directives.name: split-gutter
directives.description: Gutter width (horizontal) or height (vertical) in pixels
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Default: 6px.

directives.name: split-persist
directives.description: localStorage key for saving/restoring pane sizes across sessions
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Stored under nojs-split:<key>. Discarded if pane count changes.

directives.name: sortable
directives.description: Enable column sorting on a table. Sorting mutates the data array and each re-renders rows

examples.html: Name Age Email
examples.description: Sortable table with string and numeric columns

directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Works with each directive in tbody. ARIA: aria-sort on headers. Clicking cycles ascending, descending, none.

directives.name: sort
directives.description: Mark a table header as sortable by a property key
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Companion attributes: sort-type (string|number|date, default string), sort-default (asc|desc). Clicking cycles: ascending, descending, none.

directives.name: sort-type
directives.description: Comparator type for column sorting
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Values: string (localeCompare), number (numeric), date (chronological). Default: string.

directives.name: sort-default
directives.description: Initial sort direction applied on page load
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Values: asc, desc.

directives.name: fixed-header
directives.description: Make a table header sticky at the top of its scroll container
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Applies position:sticky; top:0. z-index: 2.

directives.name: fixed-col
directives.description: Pin a table column to the left edge during horizontal scrolling
directives.notes: Plugin: @erickxavier/nojs-elements. Applies position:sticky; left:0. z-index: 1. Intersection with fixed-header gets z-index: 3.

directives.name: t
directives.description: Translate element content using an i18n key

directives.name: t-*
directives.description: Pass parameters to translation strings

directives.name: t-html
directives.description: Render translation value as sanitized HTML instead of plain text. Companion to `t`.

directives.name: ref
directives.description: Named element reference accessible from context

directives.name: call
directives.description: Trigger an API call on click, with loading/error/success templates

examples.description: API call with loading state and redirect

directives.notes: Supports: method, body, headers, loading, error, success, redirect, confirm, as. AbortController switchMap on re-click.

directives.name: trigger
directives.description: Emit a custom event from the element

directives.name: use
directives.description: Instantiate a template inline

directives.name: include
directives.description: Synchronously clone an inline template into the current position

directives.name: page-title
directives.description: Reactively set the document <title>. Place on a <div hidden> host element.

examples.description: Dynamic page title from reactive state

directives.notes: Watches the expression and updates <title> whenever the reactive context changes. Priority 1.

directives.name: page-description
directives.description: Reactively set <meta name="description"> in <head>. Creates the tag if absent.

examples.description: Dynamic meta description from product data

directives.notes: Watches the expression and updates the meta content whenever the reactive context changes. Priority 1.

directives.name: page-canonical
directives.description: Reactively set <link rel="canonical"> in <head>. Creates the tag if absent.

examples.description: Dynamic canonical URL from product slug

directives.notes: Watches the expression and updates the canonical href whenever the reactive context changes. Priority 1.

directives.name: page-jsonld
directives.description: Reactively set <script type="application/ld+json" data-nojs> in <head>. Value is an expression evaluating to an object (JSON.stringify applied) or a JSON string with {interpolation} placeholders.
directives.notes: The data-nojs marker distinguishes the managed tag from hand-written JSON-LD so they can coexist. Priority 1.

directives.name: error-boundary
directives.description: Error boundary — renders fallback template on error
